title: Contact LILYGO about T-Echo PPS
description: After Mark explicitly approves the prepared packet, contact the appropriate LILYGO engineering/business channel to confirm current T-Echo PPS routing and discuss a PPS-capable revision or sample. This Bead does not authorize contact by itself.
design: Start with engineering fact-finding, not procurement negotiation. Send the approved concise introduction and attachment; request an engineering owner and durable written answers. Use a bounded follow-up cadence. Record every material answer, date, contact role, document/revision shared, and confidentiality restriction. Do not accept NDA, quote, sample charge, NRE, MOQ, branding, exclusivity, roadmap, or purchase terms without separate approval.
acceptance_criteria: Explicit authorization to send is recorded; the approved message is sent through an official or verified LILYGO channel; receipt/contact owner and follow-up dates are recorded; answers or no-response outcome cover current PPS routing, feasible GPIO/test point, electrical characteristics, board revision path, samples, documentation, NRE, MOQ, pricing bands, and lead time; no commercial commitment is made implicitly or explicitly.
